name: Russell's Range
short_description: Complete tasks and keep the range running while following the rules and avoiding the creatures that lurk in the shadows.
detailed_description:
Welcome to the mad world of Russell's Range!
Your job is to complete your tasks through each night, however the job isn't as easy as it seems. You find yourself fighting for your life as the night progresses in a survival horror management game where not everything is as it seems. You will need to perform tasks through the night such as setting the tables to get ready for the next day, and placing decoration in their proper places. However there are creatures determined to catch you, so you must use your flashlight, cameras and wits to fend them off and survive the night.

Russell's Range was created using unreal engine and blender!
